title: Health & Damage HUD
description: Displays health and damage indicators for entities in a simple and intuitive way!
body:
![thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c6cc53dab718a2a7da4d891cb5f2f80ff6eb197_0.webp)
### **Health & Damage HUD**

> **Health & Damage HUD** enhances your Minecraft experience by displaying health and damage indicators for all entities in a clear and intuitive way.
> 
#### Features:
1. **Mob Health Display**:
   - See the current health of any mob when you target or approach it.
```
[❤️ 16/20] ProdigeGasy
```

   
2. **Damage Taken Display**:
   - When mobs take damage, the amount is shown in red above them, giving instant feedback on your attacks.

3. **Healing Display**:
   - Any health recovered by mobs (via potions or natural regeneration) appears in green, letting you track healing in real-time.
4. **Custom Names**:
Custom-named mobs will display their health and damage indicators with their names!
   
#### Why Use This Datapack?
- **Instant Clarity**: Easily monitor mob health and see the impact of your actions.
- **Combat Strategy**: Adjust your tactics based on real-time health and damage indicators.
- **Simple and Lightweight**: This HUD is easy to use, non-intrusive, and works seamlessly in survival mode.

Perfect for players seeking more transparency in combat without adding complex mechanics.
## Uninstalling
Ready to say goodbye to the Datapack? No problem! Simply follow these **simple steps**:

1. Access the Chat Window.
2. Enter the Uninstall Command and press Enter: 
```
/function hd_in:uninstall
```
3. You can now remove it safely from the Datapacks folder, every trace of the datapack has been removed.

### Additional Notes
- Compatible with all other datapacks, following the standard conventions.
- This datapack was coded using JMC
